stories.headline: How Pakistan mediated a US-Iran agreement after more than 100 days of war
stories.description: PM Sharif praises Pakistan’s army chief for his efforts in securing a tentative deal, likely to be finalised in Geneva.

stories.headline: Record daily jump in DRC Ebola outbreak takes death toll to 178
stories.description: The Ebola outbreak, caused by the rare Bundibugyo virus strain, has reached 782 confirmed cases.

stories.headline: Arrest over push of woman into bus's path in Putney in 2017
stories.description: A 44-year-old man is in custody over the incident where a woman appeared to be shoved into the path of a bus.
